name: Hercules Offshore, Inc.
description: Hercules Offshore, Inc. was a provider of shallow-water drilling and marine services to the oil and natural gas exploration and production industry. The company operated a fleet of jackup rigs and liftboats, providing services such as drilling, well workovers, platform maintenance, and construction support, primarily in the Gulf of Mexico and international markets. Hercules Offshore filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy protection and subsequently liquidated its assets.
